task: T21: Orphan file/script/action search and repair

decisions.question: Output format
decisions.choice: Script (scripts/detect-orphans.js), not a skill
decisions.rationale: Diagnostic tool, not a workflow

decisions.question: Graph storage
decisions.choice: In-memory per run
decisions.rationale: Repo small enough for full rebuild; persisted graphs go stale

decisions.question: Report format
decisions.choice: Both JSONL + Markdown
decisions.rationale: JSONL for machine triage/TDMS, Markdown for human review

decisions.question: Scope
decisions.choice: All 9 categories, no deferrals
decisions.rationale: User requested full build with no deferrals

decisions.question: Text reference parsing
decisions.choice: Format-aware (B): JS AST for imports, regex for .md, JSON/YAML parsing for configs
decisions.rationale: Simple grep too many false positives, full NLP overkill

decisions.question: Confidence levels
decisions.choice: HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW per finding based on heuristics
decisions.rationale: archive/ = HIGH, recent git activity = LOW

decisions.question: Triage output
decisions.choice: Proposed actions per item (delete/archive/wire-up/keep-as-standalone)
decisions.rationale: Saves manual classification step

decisions.question: Architecture
decisions.choice: Script + agent orchestration (D): deterministic detection script, AI-driven triage agents
decisions.rationale: Detection repeatable via npm run, judgment benefits from AI context

decisions.question: JS import parsing
decisions.choice: Regex for require/import patterns
decisions.rationale: Scripts are straightforward CJS/ESM, AST adds dependency for minimal gain

decisions.question: Skill/agent text patterns
decisions.choice: Match: slash-commands, backtick commands, agent names, markdown links, quoted paths
decisions.rationale: Covers all known reference styles in .md files

decisions.question: State file ownership
decisions.choice: String-match state file basenames across all .js files
decisions.rationale: State files have no imports; only detectable via string literals

decisions.question: Planning/research orphan definition
decisions.choice: Directory whose todo is completed/absent AND no active skill/plan references it
decisions.rationale: Completed initiatives are archival, not broken references

decisions.question: npm script validation
decisions.choice: Yes, include dead npm script detection as sub-check
decisions.rationale: Explorer found 2 dead workflow refs; same pattern in package.json

decisions.question: npm script names
decisions.choice: orphans:detect (scanner) + orphans:report (Markdown regen)
decisions.rationale: Consistent with existing npm script naming

decisions.question: Output location
decisions.choice: .planning/orphan-detection/findings.jsonl + REPORT.md
decisions.rationale: Planning/maintenance artifact, not operational state or user docs

decisions.question: TDMS integration
decisions.choice: No TDMS intake — present fix options to resolve on the spot
decisions.rationale: User wants immediate resolution, not debt deferral

decisions.question: Incremental runs
decisions.choice: Diff against previous JSONL — flag NEW/RESOLVED/UNCHANGED
decisions.rationale: Shows progress across cleanup passes

decisions.question: Hook/session integration
decisions.choice: No for v1 — manual runs only
decisions.rationale: Can add to /alerts later if needed

decisions.question: Agent triage scope
decisions.choice: One agent per category, parallel (C)
decisions.rationale: Parallel keeps it fast, each agent needs only its category context

decisions.question: Archive strategy
decisions.choice: scripts/archive/ for scripts (existing convention), git-delete for everything else
decisions.rationale: Git history is sufficient archive for non-script files
